title: 한국 야구, WBC 4강 진출
summary: 대한민국 야구 대표팀이 월드 베이스볼 클래식 4강에 진출했습니다.
content: South Korea advanced to the World Baseball Classic semifinals with a dramatic victory. The team showed exceptional teamwork throughout the tournament. Key players delivered crucial hits in the knockout stage. Fans celebrated the achievement across the country. The manager praised the players' determination and spirit. Opposing teams acknowledged Korea's strong performance. The semifinal match will be held next week. Ticket sales for the upcoming game have already sold out. National team jerseys are seeing increased sales. Baseball analysts are optimistic about Korea's chances. The victory has boosted national pride significantly.
